---
id: query-automation-list
title: "查询自动化列表"
description: "查询自动化列表，支持通过自动化类型、排序方式、分页等参数进行筛选和检索。"
sidebar_label: "查询自动化列表"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-api/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"查询自动化列表"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/automations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



查询自动化列表，支持通过自动化类型、排序方式、分页等参数进行筛选和检索。

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"query","name":"definitionTypes","required":false,"description":"自动化类型列表。    \n支持如下值：\nSCRIPT_JSON：通过 API 创建的 Flow 自动化。  \nSCRIPT_TEXT：通过 Aqara Studio Web 页面创建的 Flow 自动化。  \nWHEN_IF_THEN：IFTTT 自动化。  \nLEGACY_FLOW：Flow 自动化（旧版）。  \nLEGACY_LINKAGE：Logic 自动化。  \nOTHER：其他自动化类型。    \n示例：definitionTypes=SCRIPT_JSON,LEGACY_FLOW 或 definitionTypes=SCRIPT_JSON&definitionTypes=LEGACY_FLOW。    \n不传或空值时查询全部类型。\n","schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["SCRIPT_JSON","SCRIPT_TEXT","WHEN_IF_THEN","LEGACY_FLOW","LEGACY_LINKAGE","OTHER"]}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"in":"query","name":"orderBy","required":false,"description":"排序方式。支持如下值：\n- createTime asc：按创建时间升序；\n- createTime desc：按创建时间降序。\n","schema":{"type":"string","default":"createTime asc","enum":["createTime asc","createTime desc"]},"example":"createTime asc"},{"in":"query","name":"pageNum","description":"页码","required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","default":1}},{"in":"query","name":"pageSize","description":"每页条数","required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","default":200}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"请求发起成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"object","required":["totalCount","pageNum","pageSize","data"],"properties":{"totalCount":{"type":"integer","description":"满足条件的自动化总数"},"pageNum":{"type":"integer","description":"当前页码"},"pageSize":{"type":"integer","description":"当前页大小"},"data":{"type":"array","description":"自动化列表","items":{"type":"object","required":["automationId","name","enabled","definitionType","createTime"],"properties":{"automationId":{"type":"string","description":"自动化 ID。"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"自动化名称。"},"enabled":{"type":"boolean","description":"是否启用。true：启用；false：禁用。"},"definitionType":{"type":"string","enum":["SCRIPT_JSON","SCRIPT_TEXT","WHEN_IF_THEN","LEGACY_FLOW","LEGACY_LINKAGE","OTHER"],"description":"自动化类型，说明如下：\n- SCRIPT_JSON：通过 API 创建的 Flow 自动化。  \n- SCRIPT_TEXT：通过 Aqara Studio Web 页面创建的 Flow 自动化。  \n- WHEN_IF_THEN：IFTTT 自动化。  \n- LEGACY_FLOW：Flow 自动化（旧版）。  \n- LEGACY_LINKAGE：Logic 自动化。  \n- OTHER：其他自动化类型。\n"},"createTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"创建时间（毫秒级 UTC
